recentTasks.title: Checkout reliability
recentTasks.latestMessage: Reproduced the checkout race and am running the focused concurrency suite. No user input is needed.

recentTasks.title: Pricing approval
recentTasks.pendingQuestion: Should annual plans keep the existing 15% discount or move to 20%?
recentTasks.latestMessage: Implementation is paused until the annual-plan discount is confirmed.

recentTasks.title: Atlas migration
recentTasks.latestMessage: The deployment completed its build, archive, dependency validation, and packaging stages. Unit tests and integration tests passed, and the release artifact was created successfully. Upload began normally, but the final production authorization step was rejected. The deployment failed because the production signing certificate expired. No files were changed after the failed deployment. Evidence token: sigcert-4Q9.
